# switch the styles for button primary and secondary

@mxmrtns @Dinkh @deniztoprak

from a design perspective, a primary ui should use an outstanding color, like:
<img width="163" alt="Screenshot 2023-02-15 at 11 48 01" src="https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/1177434/219006756-74803190-d67b-46c5-b36f-c892f5614c7d.png">

inside neo, we are mostly (only) using the "default" version. meaning: a button should use `ui: 'secondary'` by default and we need to switch the styling for both themes to match it.

before the client project MVP is done, i won't find time for it, but i wanted to at least create the ticket already, so that this topic does not get lost.
